fields.description:
## Why
The model emits no holistic severity/confidence anywhere in the decision path; the decision is deterministic
code.

## What
- Cited-reference veto (ONLY when a code citation is present) -> a UNIFIED PRIORITY SCORE computed DETERMINISTICALLY
  from the Pass-2 sub-answers. FORMULA (v1 default — per the epic's Pass-3 spec; the attribute weights are
  calibration-tunable): validity ∈ [0,1] = graded fraction of the binary sub-answers (yes=1 / insufficient=.5 /
  no=0); impact ∈ [0,1] = the deterministic mean of the five Pass-2 severity attributes, each ordinal mapped to
  [0,1] (prod/debt_impact max; blast_radius; likelihood; reversibility); PRIORITY = validity × impact ∈ [0,1]
  (both LLM-judged spectrums, so a low-validity/high-impact finding can outrank a high-validity/low-impact one).
  decision = DROP if validity < .5; else BLOCK iff (not cited-reference-vetoed) AND priority ≥ the criterion's
  `block_threshold` (default 0.95, criterion opted into blocking); else ADVISORY.
- ADVISORY SURFACING CAP: the surfaced advisory findings are the top-N by priority score, N = a CONFIG value
  (default 10, owned by `55de`); advisory overflow beyond N -> `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar (recorded, not surfaced).
  BLOCKING findings are EXEMPT from the cap: never dropped; if blocking count > N, ALL blocking findings are
  returned. The cap can never suppress a block.

- Pass-3's SURVIVING (advisory, not-dropped) findings feed the Pass-4 affirmative coach `75a9` (crusty-herb-stand), which primes the caller with a next move per finding and NEVER alters this pass's decision.
## Scope
- Pure code (no LLM). Defaults advisory-only in v1 (only the DET floor blocks); per-criterion blocking is
  opt-in; thresholds project-overridable and start high.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Deterministic veto -> confidence -> severity -> decision; no model holistic severity/confidence in the path.
- [ ] Advisory-only default; per-criterion blocking opt-in; thresholds configurable.
- [ ] Unified priority score (deterministic: validity + impact combined) drives block-threshold + advisory ranking; no model holistic score in the path.
- [ ] Advisory surfacing cap = config top-N (default 10, owned by `55de`); overflow advisory -> sidecar; BLOCKING never capped (ALL blocking returned even if > N); cap is config-driven + tunable.
- [ ] Unit-tested aggregation (veto, confidence, severity buckets, decision).
